task_context.actionable_question: Does submitting late actually lower my score?
task_context.ai_prompt_hint: Use submission_delay_avg [FE] and punctuality_rate [FE]. Explain how delay magnitude correlates with score drop.

explanation.raw_text:
Summary: Your submission patterns show that you have not submitted any assessments yet, which means there is currently no data on submission delays or punctuality. This lack of submissions can impact your overall engagement and performance in the course.

Insights: No Submissions Recorded: You have not submitted any assessments, which results in a punctuality rate of '0'. This indicates that you are not engaging with the assessments on time, which can affect your learning progress.

Educational implications: Engaging with assessments is crucial for your learning and understanding of the material.

Recommendations: high - Start submitting your assessments on time. - Submitting your work on time will help you improve your scores and enhance your understanding of the course content.
